rateLimitCapacity.name: Rate limit — max pings per window
rateLimitCapacity.hint: Maximum pings any one user may emit within the window below. GMs are exempt. Default: 3.

rateLimitWindowMs.name: Rate limit — window (ms)
rateLimitWindowMs.hint: Sliding window over which the rate limit applies. Default: 5000ms (3 per 5s by default).

minRallyRole.name: Rally — minimum receiver role for viewport pan
minRallyRole.hint: Users below this role still see the rally ping but their viewport will not auto-pan to it. Default: Trusted.

minAlertRole.name: Alert — minimum sender role
minAlertRole.hint: Users below this role cannot send alert pings (they'll see a notification). Default: Assistant.

triggerBinding.name: Trigger binding
triggerBinding.hint: Mouse button (plus optional modifiers) that initiates the ping gesture. Examples: 'LeftClick', 'Shift + LeftClick', 'MiddleClick'. Default: LeftClick.

holdDurationMs.name: Hold duration (ms)
holdDurationMs.hint: How long the trigger must be held before the preview ping appears. Default: 350ms.

holdCancelTolerancePx.name: Hold cancel tolerance (px)
holdCancelTolerancePx.hint: Drag distance during the initial hold that cancels the gesture. Default: 5px.

menuSummonPx.name: Menu summon distance (px)
menuSummonPx.hint: Drag distance past which the radial menu opens. Also acts as the center deadzone (return inside to commit 'here'). Default: 25px.

audioEnabled.name: Enable ping sounds
audioEnabled.hint: Play a short sound when a ping appears.

notifications.alertRoleRequired: Alert pings require Assistant role or higher.
notifications.noTokenUnderCursor: Pings: no token under the cursor.
notifications.tokenMovementBlocked: Pings: {name} is marked — movement blocked until the marker fades.
